title: lass humifusa
intro: Lass humifusa, also known as American ginseng, is a perennial plant native to the woodlands of eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lass humifusa include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and fatigue, and boosting the immune system. Lass humifusa can be prepared into various herbal forms, including dried root, capsule, and tea, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
